archetype: Automated Seismic Event Detection and Alert System for Underground Mining Operations
description: This system uses machine learning algorithms to analyze seismic data from underground mining operations to detect and alert on potential seismic events, such as rockbursts or gas outbursts. The system is used by mining operators and safety personnel to ensure the safety of miners and prevent accidents. The system must handle large amounts of real-time data from various seismic sensors and integrate with existing mining infrastructure.
rules: MUST adhere to the International Society of Rock Mechanics (ISRM) standards for seismic monitoring in mines
MUST integrate with existing mining infrastructure, including ventilation and communication systems
MUST comply with the Mine Safety and Health Administration (MSHA) regulations for seismic monitoring and alert systems
MUST handle data from various seismic sensor types, including accelerometers and seismometers
MUST provide real-time alerts and notifications to mining personnel in the event of a detected seismic event
anti_patterns: DO NOT rely solely on manual analysis of seismic data, as this can lead to delayed detection and response times
DO NOT use a single sensor type or location, as this can result in incomplete or inaccurate data
DO NOT neglect to consider the effects of mining activities on seismic data, such as blasting and drilling
key_technical_challenges: Developing machine learning algorithms that can accurately detect seismic events in real-time
Integrating with existing mining infrastructure and handling diverse sensor data
Ensuring system reliability and uptime in a harsh underground mining environment

recommended_stack.language: Python + extensive libraries for machine learning and data analysis
recommended_stack.framework: Apache Spark + scalability and real-time processing capabilities
recommended_stack.database_engine: TimescaleDB + optimized for time-series data and high-performance
recommended_stack.cache: Redis + fast data access and caching for real-time alerts
recommended_stack.message_broker: Apache Kafka + scalable and fault-tolerant message handling
special_services: Seismic data processing and analysis services
